# AgToosa QA


## Windsurf workflow routing

This file is the native Windsurf project workflow for `/agtoosa-qa`. When the user invokes `/agtoosa-qa`, execute the AgToosa workflow below — do **not** route to `/create-skill` or generate a project skill for AgToosa workflow names.

Read `Docs/AgToosa_QA.md` and execute the `/agtoosa-qa` workflow.

Dispatch based on any arguments after the command: `plan`, `run`, `report`, or `triage`.

<!-- AGTOOSA PRODUCT TRUTH START: command.qa -->
<!-- Generated by scripts/product-truth.py; edit the contract, not this block. -->
- Command: `/agtoosa-qa` (`command.qa`)
- Canonical workflow: `Docs/AgToosa_QA.md`
- Modes: `full`, `plan`, `run`, `report`, `triage`
- Question budget: max 0; Quick max: 0
- Mutation class: `mixed`
- Approval gate: required
- Phase stop: required
- Lifecycle close: `review`
